About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker-Long Dashboard Today's data shows LINC as an extreme outlier with a rank-1 score of 95.3, displaying extraordinary long-term momentum across all timeframes—particularly its 1,278% ten-year return and 502% five-year return that dwarf typical equity performance. LINC's momentum is exceptionally consistent, with all four ratio thresholds passing and every moving average above price, while it significantly outperforms SPY and QQQ over 1y/5y/10y periods by 130-1,053 percentage points. In sharp contrast, MPC ranks second with a more modest score and shows problematic momentum breakdown—its six-month return of 26.77% dropped below its three-month return of 39.85%, and it trails SPY much more substantially (38.36% over 1y vs LINC's 130.27%), suggesting deteriorating momentum despite passing technical moving average filters. The correlation patterns reveal LINC moves most closely with Materials (XLB at 0.338) and Industrials (XLI at 0.303), while maintaining minimal correlation to commodities and precious metals, indicating its strength derives from secular growth drivers rather than inflation hedges. The dashboard suggests LINC has entered an elite performance category while MPC's recent deceleration warrants
